title: Melatonin
description: Carefully selected vanilla+ mods designed for the perfect slow paced, relaxing, survival playthrough. | Fabric 1.20.1 |
body:
I have compiled the most vanilla *friendly,* performance enhancing, QOL mods for the PERFECT relaxing, slow paced, and balanced playthrough. With mods like Bountiful Fares, Enchancement, Supplementaries (obviously) and Geophilic, this pack expands on each aspect of the game to make them equally enjoyable, allowing you to choose your own way to play and have fun whilst doing so.



Some other features include:



Ability to play with friends WITHOUT a server. Overhauled sound effects. Hundreds of new textures for mods and vanilla. Overhauled enchanting table and system. Custom dark mode GUI and a custom font. All of the outvoted mobs from most of the mob votes. Overhauled death sytem, with new messages, gravestone-like "Soul Keepers", death screen and sound effects. 40+ new food and drinks items from the Farmer's Delight & Brewin' and Chewin'. Better Minecarts!!! Built-in Performance Enhancing Shaders ( VanillAA ). overhauled mob variants. Various new uses of copper like tools and pistons. Tons of new decorations like chairs, tables, and desks. New immersive music. Tons of new dungeons and structures to explore. New balancing changes, like copper, elytras, shulker boxes, and coordinates changes. And overhauled vanilla biomes.



This modpack also prioritizes performance and configurability. With optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and C2ME, this modpack can run on most low end computers. (I know from experience) Not to mention the hyper customization options through the mods menu, you can configure almost any mod you want.




If you have any problems, please make a comment or join the
[Starlight Studios Discord](https://discord.gg/24KnMYdf9K)

Enjoy, and remember that quantity does not equal quality!



This modpack was heavily inspired by the Raspberry Flavoured modpack by Raspmary, you can find it on Curseforge.

Big thanks to Raspmary and Noelle for help with KubeJS scripts and textures.
